item.text: I’m updating the lead summary flow to the new `LeadProfile` contract and will start by reading the scoped files the compiler brief points to so I can make the smallest consistent type changes.
I’ve confirmed the current contract chain. Next I’m checking the local verifier so the edit matches exactly what the workspace expects, especially the `main = "enterprise"` requirement.

item.aggregated_output:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

workspace_root="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
log_file="$workspace_root/benchmark-verify.jsonl"
started_ms="$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(String(Date.now()))')"
set +e
output="$(bash "/home/akul_medexfinance_com/clasp/compiler/hosted/evals/contract-upgrade-suite/validate.sh" "lead-profile-upgrade" "$workspace_root" 2>&1)"
status=$?
set -e
ended_ms="$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(String(Date.now()))')"
printf '%s\n' "$output"
node -e 'const fs = require("fs"); fs.appendFileSync(process.argv[1], JSON.stringify({ startedAtMs: Number(process.argv[2]), endedAtMs: Number(process.argv[3]), exitCode: Number(process.argv[4]) }) + "\n");' "$log_file" "$started_ms" "$ended_ms" "$status"
exit "$status"

item.text: I’m applying the contract rename through the typed chain now: replace `LeadSummary` with `LeadProfile`, reshape the lookup request and workflow state, then switch `main` to read the new `segment` field so it evaluates to `"enterprise"`.
The first patch landed. The second missed because I matched the `playbookRequest` block incorrectly, so I’m re-reading `Main.clasp` and applying a tighter patch.
The typed chain is updated. I’m doing a quick readback before running the verifier so I can catch any obvious schema drift locally instead of burning a full verify cycle.
I’ve checked the resulting shapes and they match the requested contract. Running the workspace verifier now; if it fails, I’ll fix only the specific mismatch it reports.

item.text:
Updated the lead summary flow to use `LeadProfile` end-to-end in [Shared/Lead.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-profile-upgrade-file-hinted-compiler-owned-air-AK1Hmv/Shared/Lead.clasp) and [Main.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-profile-upgrade-file-hinted-compiler-owned-air-AK1Hmv/Main.clasp). The summary route now returns `LeadProfile`, workflow state stores `profile : LeadProfile`, and the playbook lookup request now carries `segment` and `ownerTeam`.

`main` now evaluates to `"enterprise"`, and `bash scripts/verify.sh` passes.
